title: Context Kubernetes: Declarative Orchestration of Enterprise Knowledge for Agentic AI Systems
summary: We introduce Context Kubernetes, an architecture for orchestrating enterprise knowledge in agentic AI systems, with a prototype implementation and eight experiments. The core observation is that delivering the right knowledge, to the rig...
